creator: hardy.schumacher@amd.com
text:
When starting gvim following warning will be printed to console:

Gtk-WARNING **: Failed to load module "libgnomebreakpad.so": Shared object "libgnomebreakpad.so" not found, required by "gvim"

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: Install editors/vim and start gvim.
I've tried it several times, warning was ever shown.
